title: The MCYT Modpack
description: This Modpack contains all the mods you need to be a Minecraft YouTuber.
body:
# **Welcome to the MCYT Modpack!** 

**This modpack contains EVERY mod a Minecraft YouTuber needs! If you're starting out as a Minecraft YouTuber, and you need a simple, lightweight modpack for your videos, the MCYT Modpack is for you!**

Make sure to subscribe to my channel!: [https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCGb0Ut4-aawQYjW2YycKHyw](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC_6eX4fDI2MN-GdGZQ9krEg)
